title: CSL Slashes FY26 Revenue by $600M, Flags $5B Impairments
headline: CSL Ltd. cut FY2026 revenue guidance to US$15.2B and flagged ~$5B in non-cash impairments related to underutilized Vifor Pharma assets, causing shares to hit a nine-year low.
key_facts: FY2026 revenue cut to US$15.2B (down ~$600M), net profit to US$3.1B at constant currency, ~$5B additional pre-tax impairments across FY2026-FY2027, total writedowns ~$6.9B including prior impairments, Vifor acquisition ~$11.7B in 2022, nine-year share low, largest single-day drop on record

title: Inhibrx Combo Therapy Outperforms Keytruda Monotherapy
headline: Inhibrx Biosciences' INBRX-106 combination therapy demonstrated superiority to Merck's Keytruda (pembrolizumab) monotherapy in Phase 2 data with differentiated tumor shrinkage.
key_facts: Phase 2 data showing INBRX-106 combo superior to Keytruda monotherapy, Keytruda annual revenue ~$25B+, approaching patent cliff

title: Daiichi Sankyo Targets Global Top 5 Oncology Rank by 2035
headline: Daiichi Sankyo outlined a strategic vision to become a global top 5 oncology company by 2035, targeting approximately $15 billion in oncology sales by 2030 driven by its ADC franchise.
key_facts: Target ~$15B oncology sales by 2030, global top 5 oncology rank by 2035, ADC (antibody-drug conjugate) franchise backbone, Enhertu partnership with AstraZeneca

title: Partner Therapeutics' Bizengri Approved for NRG1 Fusion Cancers
headline: FDA approved Partner Therapeutics' Bizengri (zenocutuzumab) for NRG1 fusion-positive cholangiocarcinoma via the Community National Priority Voucher (CNPV) pilot program.
key_facts: Bizengri (zenocutuzumab) approved for NRG1 fusion-positive cholangiocarcinoma, FDA CNPV pilot program pathway, NRG1 fusions ~0.2% of solid tumors, precision oncology rare-tumor indication

title: European Regulators Greenlight First GLP-1 Gene Therapy Trial
headline: European regulators approved the first-ever clinical trial of a GLP-1 gene therapy, with Fractyl separately launching a diabetes gene therapy trial.
key_facts: First clinical trial of GLP-1 gene therapy approved by European regulators, Fractyl diabetes gene therapy trial initiated, UC Berkeley startup involvement referenced, one-time gene therapy vs. chronic injections/pills

title: GSK Licenses Bepirovirsen to Sino Biopharmaceutical for China
headline: GSK struck a deal with Sino Biopharmaceutical to license hepatitis B drug bepirovirsen for the China market.
key_facts: GSK-Sino Biopharmaceutical licensing deal for bepirovirsen in China, separate GSK-Arrowhead $1B obesity siRNA deal noted from prior week

title: Rezdiffra Exceeding Wall Street Expectations in MASH Market
headline: Madrigal Pharmaceuticals' Rezdiffra (resmetirom) is exceeding Wall Street sales expectations as the MASH market gains commercial traction.
key_facts: Rezdiffra (resmetirom) exceeding Wall Street expectations, MASH market TAM estimated ~$30B+, first-mover advantage holding

title: Eli Lilly Invests Additional $4.5B in Indiana Manufacturing
headline: Eli Lilly announced an additional $4.5 billion investment across Indiana manufacturing to meet growing demand for weight-loss drugs Mounjaro and Zepbound (tirzepatide).
key_facts: Additional $4.5B investment across Indiana, weight-loss drugs tirzepatide (Mounjaro, Zepbound), supply constraint concerns, sustained demand trajectory confidence

title: Braveheart Bio's Hengrui-Licensed Cardiac Drug Scores Second Win
headline: Braveheart Bio reported a second positive clinical readout for a cardiac drug licensed from Hengrui Pharmaceuticals.
key_facts: Braveheart Bio second positive clinical readout, Hengrui Pharmaceuticals China-originated asset, Western clinical validation of Chinese biotech asset
